headline: Frank Lampard
body: Frank Lampard is close to agreeing a new deal with Coventry, Sky Sports News understands ⚽️ Lampard is approaching the final year of his contract but talks are progressing for him to extend his stay. Video
text:
Frank Lampard is close to agreeing a new deal with Coventry, Sky Sports News understands ⚽️

Lampard is approaching the final year of his contract but talks are progressing for him to extend his stay.

Video
